top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis = 'BEHCET' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M' 
  AND strftime('%Y', p.'First Date') = '1981';
